note: Each entry runs a skill on a cadence and writes the output to docs/reports/scheduled/. cadence is one of weekly|biweekly|monthly. day is 0-6 (Sun-Sat) for weekly/biweekly, or 1-28 (day-of-month) for monthly. inputs are the skill's inputs in order. Delivery is 'commit' by default; wire email/slack in the workflow. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Add your own — this file is the schedule.

reports.title: Weekly Portfolio Pulse
inputs: Audience: the leadership team. Cadence: weekly.

This week across the product portfolio: (paste your notes, metrics, and incidents here — or wire this input to a data source in the workflow). Absent real input, produce a clearly-labelled TEMPLATE the operator fills in.

reports.title: Monthly Strategy Review
inputs: Quarter context and current objectives (paste here, or wire to a source).
Produce a review-ready draft; where inputs are missing, mark them [FILL IN] rather than inventing facts.
